vehicles.description: The Husqvarna Vitpilen 250 is a café racer motorcycle that combines minimalist Swedish design with Austrian engineering. It features a 249cc liquid-cooled engine with modern amenities and responsive handling, making it suitable for both city commuting and occasional highway rides.
features: 249cc BS6 Phase 2B single-cylinder engine producing 30.57 bhp and 25 Nm torque
Dual disc brakes with ABS and switchable Supermoto mode
WP APEX suspension with 43mm USD forks and adjustable monoshock
5-inch LCD instrument cluster with all-LED lighting

technical_specifications.features: 5-inch LCD display, Type-C USB charging, Traction control, Bi-directional quickshifter, All-LED lighting, 43mm USD forks

vehicles.description: The Husqvarna Svartpilen 401 is a modern scrambler-style street bike with performance-oriented engineering and advanced technology. Powered by a 399cc engine, it features a fully digital console, multiple riding modes, and traction control for a versatile riding experience.
features: 399cc BS6 Phase 2B single-cylinder engine producing 42.9 bhp and 39 Nm torque
Fully digital console with multiple riding modes

technical_specifications.features: Fully digital console with riding modes, Traction control
